## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Managing Editor role at GrowthX for their AI-led growth community and content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role focuses on driving content engine for GrowthX's paid AI-led growth community platform](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Seeking someone to own content creation, facilitate workshops/podcasts, and develop comprehensive courses](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Immediate priorities: Create cohesive course tying existing content together, roadmap content for next 1-2 quarters](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)
  - [Open to creative ideas for content types, tools (e.g. free GPTs), and shaping overall content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Role Context

  - [GrowthX: AI-focused growth agency, raised Series A, revenue grew from \~$2M to $13M this year](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Content marketing revolves around AI-led growth community with workshops, podcasts, newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Seeking Managing Editor to own content creation, facilitate production, develop comprehensive courses](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Goal: Build large, engaged community consuming GrowthX content (driving agency leads/new product opportunities)](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Content Creation Process and AI Tools

  - [Use mix of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) and proprietary platform with specialized models](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Content workflow: Research → Draft → Optimize for client guidelines → SEO/formatting](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Heavy focus on "artifacts" - foundational documents outlining audience, problems, tone, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Open to ideas for new content types, tools (e.g. free GPTs) to engage audience](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)

### Candidate Background and Experience

  - [Georgina's experience: Journalism (conflict reporting), magazine editing, agency work (B2B tech focus)](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Currently driving AI implementation at current agency, creating internal courses on AI usage](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Strong interest in AI developments, aptitude for tech processes, enjoys mentoring/teaching](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Immediate Priorities and Opportunities

  - [Create cohesive course tying together existing workshop content](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)
  - [Develop content roadmap for next 1-2 quarters (workshops, podcasts, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
  - [Potential to create free tools (e.g. GPTs, brand checkers) as lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [Shape overall content strategy and narrative around AI in marketing/growth](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up with next steps in hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [Georgina to send writing samples (magazine work, editorial course deck, thought leadership pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2611.0)
  - [Georgina to share her custom Gemini Gem for full-funnel marketing ideation](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [If interested, next step is a writing exercise on a provided topic](https://fathom.video/share/wxSpgygsJbyxRsV79fTbACABHWfpE8aN?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
